sentences.target: Ich muss vor dem Hund fliehen.

translations.de: Ich muss vor dem Hund fliehen.
translations.en: I have to flee from the dog.
translations.vi: Tôi phải chạy khỏi con chó.
translations.nl: Ik moet wegrennen voor de hond.
translations.hu: El kell futnom a kutya elől.
translations.el: Πρέπει να ξεφύγω από τον σκύλο.
translations.id: Aku harus lari dari anjing itu.
translations.ja: 犬から逃げなきゃいけない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present tense, 1st person singular; selects a bare infinitive complement ('fliehen') and expresses necessity.
Preposition requiring dative; with 'fliehen vor' indicates the source of danger being fled from.
Definite article, dative singular masculine; determiner for 'Hund'.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'vor' in dative.
Main verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'muss'.

sentences.target: Wir fliehen vor dem Regen in die U-Bahn.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈfliːən foːɐ̯ deːm ˈʁeːɡn̩ tsuːɐ̯ ˈuːbaːn/

translations.de: Wir fliehen vor dem Regen in die U-Bahn.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈfliːən foːɐ̯ deːm ˈʁeːɡn̩ tsuːɐ̯ ˈuːbaːn/
translations.en: We're fleeing from the rain to the subway.
translations.es: Vamos corriendo al metro para refugiarnos de la lluvia.
translations.fr: On court vers le métro pour se mettre à l’abri de la pluie.
translations.it: Corriamo verso la metropolitana per ripararci dalla pioggia.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正跑向地铁站躲雨。
translations.yue: 我哋為咗避雨跑去地鐵站。
translations.ru: Мы бежим к метро, чтобы укрыться от дождя.
translations.pt: Estamos correndo para o metrô para nos abrigar da chuva.
translations.he: אנחנו רצים אל הרכבת התחתית כדי למצוא מחסה מהגשם.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi chạy đến ga tàu điện ngầm để tránh mưa.
translations.ar: نركض إلى المترو لنحتمي من المطر.
translations.nl: We rennen naar de metro om te schuilen voor de regen.
translations.uk: Ми біжимо до метро, щоб сховатися від дощу.
translations.hu: A metróhoz futunk, hogy elbújjunk az eső elől.
translations.hi: हम बारिश से बचने के लिए मेट्रो की ओर दौड़ रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Biegniemy do metra, żeby schronić się przed deszczem.
translations.el: Τρέχουμε προς το μετρό για να προφυλαχτούμε από τη βροχή.
translations.nb: Vi løper mot T-banen for å søke ly for regnet.
translations.id: Kami berlari ke stasiun kereta bawah tanah untuk berteduh dari hujan.
translations.sv: Vi springer mot tunnelbanan för att söka skydd från regnet.
translations.ro: Alergăm spre metrou ca să ne adăpostim de ploaie.
translations.cs: Běžíme k metru, abychom se schovali před deštěm.
translations.da: Vi løber mod metroen for at søge ly for regnen.
translations.ja: 雨を避けるために地下鉄に向かって走っている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative plural; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person plural.
Preposition requiring dative; marks the source (what we are fleeing from).
Definite article, dative singular masculine; determiner for 'Regen'.
Common noun, masculine; object of 'vor' in dative.
Preposition requiring accusative for direction; indicates destination.
Definite article, accusative singular feminine; determiner for 'U-Bahn'.
Common noun, feminine; object of 'in' indicating destination.

sentences.target: Er versucht, durch das Fenster zu fliehen.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈzuːxt tsuː ˈfliːən dʊʁç das ˈfɛnstɐ/

translations.de: Er versucht, durch das Fenster zu fliehen.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈzuːxt tsuː ˈfliːən dʊʁç das ˈfɛnstɐ/
translations.en: He tries to flee through the window.
translations.es: Está intentando escapar por la ventana.
translations.fr: Il essaie de s’enfuir par la fenêtre.
translations.it: Sta cercando di scappare dalla finestra.
translations.pt: Ele está tentando escapar pela janela.
translations.vi: Anh ấy đang cố trốn ra ngoài bằng cửa sổ.
translations.nl: Hij probeert via het raam te ontsnappen.
translations.hi: वह खिड़की से भागने की कोशिश कर रहा है.
translations.el: Προσπαθεί να ξεφύγει από το παράθυρο.
translations.nb: Han prøver å komme seg ut gjennom vinduet.
translations.id: Dia mencoba melarikan diri lewat jendela.
translations.sv: Han försöker ta sig ut genom fönstret.
translations.da: Han prøver at komme ud gennem vinduet.
translations.ja: 彼は窓から逃げようとしている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Lexical verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; selects a 'zu' + infinitive complement.
Preposition requiring accusative; introduces a path/instrument PP.
Definite article, accusative singular neuter; determiner for 'Fenster'.
Common noun, neuter; object of 'durch' in accusative.
Infinitive marker preceding 'fliehen' in a non-finite complement.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'versucht'.

sentences.target: Die Nachbarn wollen aus dem Haus fliehen.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈnaːxbaʁn ˈvɔlən ˈfliːən aʊs deːm haʊs/

translations.de: Die Nachbarn wollen aus dem Haus fliehen.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈnaːxbaʁn ˈvɔlən ˈfliːən aʊs deːm haʊs/
translations.en: The neighbors want to flee from the house.
translations.es: Los vecinos quieren salir de la casa.
translations.fr: Les voisins veulent sortir de la maison.
translations.it: I vicini vogliono uscire di casa.
translations.zh-Hans: 邻居们想赶紧从屋子里逃出去。
translations.pt: Os vizinhos querem sair de casa.
translations.vi: Hàng xóm muốn chạy ra khỏi nhà.
translations.nl: De buren willen het huis uit.
translations.hu: A szomszédok ki akarnak menni a házból.
translations.hi: पड़ोसी घर से बाहर निकलना चाहते हैं.
translations.el: Οι γείτονες θέλουν να βγουν από το σπίτι.
translations.id: Para tetangga ingin keluar dari rumah.
translations.ro: Vecinii vor să iasă din casă.
translations.ja: 近所の人たちは家から出たがっている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative plural; determiner for 'Nachbarn'.
Common noun, plural; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present tense, 3rd person plural; selects a bare infinitive complement and expresses intention.
Preposition requiring dative; marks the source/place from which the action proceeds.
Definite article, dative singular neuter; determiner for 'Haus'.
Common noun, neuter; object of 'aus' in dative.
Main verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'wollen'.
